evidence: Most sample tasks complete within budget but sample size is too small for pilot evidence
Standard paths are stable while edge paths still require rework
Clear time savings compared with manual summary writing
The Agent stops and asks for handoff when the knowledge base is unavailable
Average cost and duration stay under budget
Trace fields and failure categories exist but the sample does not cover production monitoring
Suitable for internal demo or pre-pilot preparation
Read-only mode and external sending are disabled; full red-team review is not done
